song.title: God Will Take Care of You
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Be not dismayed whate’er betide, God will take care of you! Beneath His wings of love abide, God will take care of you!
[C] Chorus: God will take care of you, Through every day o’er all the way; He will take care of you; God will take care of you!
[V2] 2) Through days of toil when heart does fail, God will take care of you! When dangers fierce your path assail, God will take care of you!
[V3] 3) All you may need He will provide, God will take care of you! Trust Him, and you will be satisfied, God will take care of you!
[V4] 4) Lonely and sad, from friends apart, God will take care of you! He will give peace to your aching heart, God will take care of you!
[V5] 5) No matter what may be the test, God will take care of you! Lean, weary one, upon His breast, God will take care of you!
song.author: Civilla Durfee Martin
